title: ranunculus vernyi var. glaber
intro: Ranunculus vernyi var. glaber is a flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It is native to East Asia, particularly in China, and is also known as the Chinese silphium or Chinese buttercup. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal properties.
